whatWasImplemented: sentry.client.config.ts, sentry.server.config.ts, sentry.edge.config.ts — guarded init that no-ops when SENTRY_DSN is absent so dev/CI never emit events. tracesSampleRate = 0.1 in production, 0 elsewhere.
instrumentation.ts — Next.js register() dispatches to the right runtime config and re-exports captureRequestError so Next's built-in error hook forwards to Sentry.
next.config.ts — wrapped with withSentryConfig when DSN is present. tunnelRoute='/monitoring' bypasses ad-blockers; silent in non-CI builds; source-map upload gated on SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.

src/lib/sentry/capture.ts — captureApiError(err, { userId, requestId }) uses Sentry.withScope to tag every captured event with environment (VERCEL_ENV || NODE_ENV || 'development'), user_id (omitted when anonymous), request_id (caller-supplied or generated). resolveRequestId(request) pulls from x-request-id → x-vercel-id → req-<uuid> fallback.

src/app/api/chat/session/route.ts — demonstration callsite: catch block now calls captureApiError with the resolved request id, so a handled exception in the widget path produces a tagged Sentry event (VAL-HARD-010).

src/__tests__/sentry-tags.test.ts — 8 tests: tag defaults, VERCEL_ENV override, user_id omission for anonymous callers, request_id generation fallback, resolveRequestId header priority (x-request-id → x-vercel-id → uuid fallback).
whatWasLeftUndone: Actual Sentry test-project DSN exchange: the test mocks @sentry/nextjs so no network call happens. Validating the 'event lands in Sentry' end of VAL-HARD-010 requires SENTRY_DSN in .env.local + visiting the dashboard — parked with Brandon as a one-time launch task (same pattern as M8F1 Upstash env).

Other API routes (crawl/start, crawl/webhook, files, leads, stripe/webhook) still use console.error only. The helper is in place; expanding call sites is a follow-on and not required for the assertion.
discoveredIssues: Next.js 16 instrumentation.ts is the modern path; sentry.server.config.ts at the project root is still re-exported from it, preserving Sentry's wizard-generated convention.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 576 passing / 1 skipped / 69 files (+8).

manualChecks.expected: Sentry.withScope called with tags { environment, user_id:'u', request_id:'r' }; captureException(err) called
